hero.description: Bridging the gap between data, algorithms, and reality. Focused on Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Quantum Computing.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a Computer Science student (5th semester) focused on Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning and Data Science. I am currently building practical projects involving statistical modeling, neural networks, and data pipelines to solve real-world problems and develop a solid technical portfolio.
about.p2: My motivation comes from the intersection of scientific curiosity and engineering: I enjoy understanding how systems work, modeling problems with precision, and transforming ideas into software that operates in reality.
about.p3: I am currently seeking opportunities — internships, research, projects or collaborations — that allow me to apply AI/ML to real-world scenarios while progressing toward a professional path as a Machine Learning Engineer / Data Scientist.

interests.title: Areas of Interest
interests.ai_desc: Creating intelligent systems that adapt, learn, and evolve to solve real-world challenges.
interests.data_desc: Extracting meaningful insights from complex datasets to drive strategic decision making.
interests.ml_desc: Building robust models and algorithms that uncover patterns often invisible to the human eye.
interests.quantum_desc: Exploring the future of computation with qubits and superposition for exponential power.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.p1_desc: A visual simulator for BB84 quantum key distribution protocol showing qubit polarization states.
projects.p2_desc: REST API that applies artistic styles to images using deep convolutional neural networks.
projects.p3_desc: Time-series forecasting platform for financial markets using LSTM networks.
projects.p4_desc: Reinforcement learning environment for training drones to navigate complex obstacle courses.
projects.p5_desc: End-to-end machine learning pipeline for predicting user churn with 94% accuracy.
projects.p6_desc: Interactive educational tool demonstrating Grover's search algorithm on a quantum computer.

vision.title: Vision of the Future
vision.conv_desc: I believe the next leap in human evolution will come from the convergence of Quantum Computing and Artificial Intelligence. Quantum algorithms will unlock the computational power needed to train the next generation of AI models.
vision.ethics_desc: As we build more powerful systems, our responsibility grows. My goal is to develop technologies that are not only efficient but also transparent, fair, and beneficial to humanity as a whole.
vision.evo_desc: Technology is a river that never stops. I am committed to staying at the bleeding edge, constantly learning and adapting to shape the digital landscape of tomorrow.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.connect_desc: I am always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your visions.
contact.alert_success: Thank you for your message! This is a demo form.

footer.text: Jefferson Santana Nogueira — AI • Machine Learning • Data Portfolio. Built with React. All rights reserved.
